title: DMZKiAttacks
description: DMZ Ki Addon adds new customizable Ki attacks to Minecraft for the DragonMineZ Mod, including configurable damage, Ki costs, and cooldowns. It expands combat with new abilities.
body:
![AddonBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45e4c514520f2f9197f81b23cbcfca0cf1294f2f.png)

**DMZ KiAttack Addon** introduces a fully functional **Ki attack system** to DragonMineZ, bringing energy-based combat to **Minecraft 1.20.1**.

DragonMineZ adds races, transformations, and the Dragon Ball universe to the game, but it currently does not include a complete Ki attack system.
This addon fills that gap by adding a variety of Ki-based attacks that players can use in combat.

All attacks are **fully configurable**, allowing server owners and modpack creators to customize damage, cooldowns, Ki costs, and other gameplay values to fit their experience.

## Features
✨ **Ki Attacks**
* Multiple Ki-based attacks inspired by Dragon Ball

⚙️ **Fully Configurable**
* Configure damage
* Adjust cooldowns
* Customize Ki cost and charge cost

🔌 **Addon Friendly**
* Designed to integrate naturally with DragonMineZ
* Compatible with other addons

## Configuration
Every attack can be customized through the config file, allowing you to tweak gameplay to match your server or modpack balance.

You can configure:
* Damage values
* Cooldowns
* Ki cost
* Ki drain while charging

## Compatibility
* Minecraft **1.20.1**
* DragonMineZ
* Compatible with other DragonMineZ addons

## Credits
Special thanks to **carlosn2300K** for granting access to the original source code, which made it possible to continue developing, improving, and expanding this addon.
